commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh The sorrows of a travailing woman shall come upon him: he is an unwise son; for he should not stay long where children are born. He shall be taken when he least expects it. His fruit shall come forth, Jeremias iv. He shall have no share in the division of property, or shall not escape when the father shall bring his children to an account. The Chaldean, insinuate, that the infant affords no help to come forth, as it would if it had sense.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
